query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN isVisible = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as visible_count, COUNT(DISTINCT productName) as unique_products, SUM(CASE WHEN productImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND productImageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_image FROM receipt_reviews LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN isVisible = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as visible_count, COUNT(DISTINCT productName) as unique_products, SUM(CASE WHEN productImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND productImageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_image FROM receipt_reviews LIMIT 1;
